scripts.build: pnpm -C apps/admin/api build && pnpm -C apps/admin/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C apps/admin/api lint && pnpm -C apps/admin/web lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -C apps/admin/api lint:fix && pnpm -C apps/admin/web lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm -C apps/admin/api format && pnpm -C apps/admin/web format
scripts.format:check: pnpm -C apps/admin/api format:check && pnpm -C apps/admin/web format:check
scripts.test: pnpm -C apps/admin/api test:run && pnpm -C apps/admin/web test:run
